Vocabulary - किं व्यर्थव्ययेन आडम्बरेण वा ? | Story 8

14 Apr 2021 | Sanskrit Sanskrit-Stories Sanskrit-Vocabulary

Image from Telegram Channel - kathaaH कथाः

Meanings from - Learnsanskrit.cc

Sanskrit Word English Meaning
कुर्वन्ति they (all) do
तदन्त coming to an end by that
पुरतः in front of
कदा when? / at what time?
अत्र here
वयम् we
ननु no doubt / surely
आरब्ध begun
इदानीम् now
अस्माकम् our

Few Sankrit Sentences

Sanskrit Sentence English Meaning
ते सर्वदा कलहं कुर्वन्ति They always quarrel.
   
उपहारगृहस्य पुरत in front of the restaurant
प्रेषणालयस्य पुरतः in front of the post office
   
कदा आगतवती ? When did you(f) come?
कदा आगतवान्? When did you(m) come?
कदा प्रस्थितः? When did you start?
कदा उक्तवान् भोः? When did you say so?
   
सः अत्र नास्ति He is not here.
अत्र आगच्छतु Come here!
तं अत्र आगन्तुं सूचयतु Ask him to come here.
अत्र आसनपरिग्रहं करोतु भवान् Take a seat here.
   
वयम् पिबामः Let us drink.
वयं सहामहे we tolerate
वयं यतामहे we try
   
भवतः शाला कदा आरब्धा? When did your school begin?
   
इयम् अस्माकं घटी This is our clock.
एतत् अस्माकं धनं न This is not our money.
पुनः अस्माकं मिलनं कदा? When shall we meet again?
अस्माकं गणे सर्वेऽपि उत्तीर्णाः Everyone graduated in our batch.

Note - All meanings are from the above mentioned website. If there is any mistake, do inform.
